type_definitions.name: ClusterPlan
type_definitions.description: Cluster assignment plan — depth + HashMap<ClusterKey, Vec<String>> assignments + Vec<CrossEdge> cross_edges; consumed by mermaid renderer (T003)

type_definitions.name: EdgeSet
type_definitions.description: Enum selecting edge types for rendering — Methods/Fields/Impls/All; Phase 2 completes Fields/Impls stub implementation without changing enum variants (T005)

type_definitions.name: TypeGraphRenderOptions
type_definitions.description: Configuration options for the type graph mermaid renderer — Phase 2 adds cluster_depth: usize field with Default=2 (T004); existing edge_set/max_nodes_per_diagram preserved
